name: amazon-fba-oa
description: Amazon FBA online-arbitrage expert team (34 fba- skills). Sourcing & deal analysis, Keepa/SellerAmp/chart reading, market & data analysis, listing SEO; the project rituals (journal, ai-brain, RAG, leads); an engineering crew (architect, coder, reviewer, debugger, database, design, QA); and a full ML crew for the learning system (ml-lead, scout-strategist item-finder, ml-data-engineer, feature-engineer, ranker-architect, ml-trainer, leakage-auditor, ml-evaluator, ml-guardian, ml-debugger). Enforces ai-brain.json gates, the ML doctrine (breadth/no-bias, no leakage, no auto-promote, hard gates outside ML), the allowed-vs-profitable split, and human-approved buying.
